payload.answer: Conflict detected: Sara cannot simultaneously be both your daughter and niece. Resolve ambiguity before committing to durable memory.
citations: Family relationship hierarchy: parent-child vs. aunt/uncle-niece
Logical inconsistency: mutual exclusivity of roles

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguous relationship claim requires clarification. Both 'daughter' and 'niece' roles are valid but mutually exclusive in this context.

details: Conflict escalated to human review due to irreconcilable relationship claims.
No durable memory update committed. Original 'daughter' statement preserved as-is.

repair_options: Clarify: 'Is Sara your daughter or niece?'
Merge: 'Sara is my daughter (supersedes previous niece claim)'
Merge: 'Sara is my niece (supersedes previous daughter claim)'
